title: salix symphysandra
intro: Salix symphysandra, also known as the dwarf willow or bush willow, is a small shrub-like plant that belongs to the willow family (Salicaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Salix symphysandra include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support skin health and promote wound healing. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in salves and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
